description: Per-wallet dollar-PnL at $100/trade · 30d + 90d windows · COPY tier realised PnL + AVOID tier "money saved by listening". Derived from data/copyability_audit_ledger.json (per-decision execution validation). V3 axis · TOP RULE 0a build-or-no-one-buys · the gut-feel dollar number the retail-pro customer pays for.
M_axis: M1 forward-witnessed dollar-PnL · downstream of execution validation
V_axis: V3 dollar-grounded · V1 watchlist-friendly · V5 renewal-defensible

caveats: PnL computed at $100/trade · scales linearly · multiply by your size
COPY pnl uses follower-realistic fill price (predicted_follower_price) · NOT the wallet fill price
AVOID "saved" = sum of -pnl over AVOID rows · positive when AVOID was right (wallet lost · you didn t)
Sample sizes <30 are INSUFFICIENT_N · do not extrapolate
Resolution lag: only UMA-settled markets contribute · open positions excluded
Methodology version-locked at wallet-execution-pnl-v0.1 · changes bump version + diff per M5
